name: @metorial/userflow
description: Manage users, groups, and events for in-app onboarding experiences. Create, update, retrieve, list, and delete users with custom attributes. Manage groups (companies/accounts) and memberships. Track custom events for segmentation and personalization. Retrieve content objects like flows, checklists, and launchers. Manage webhook subscriptions to receive notifications for user, group, flow, checklist, and launcher events. Administer account settings, team members, and invitations.
